title: Ban Bueng Phra Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ban Bueng Phra with a Z-Score of +3.74. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Ban Bueng Phra is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 80%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 11.7 km/h, but it is not enough to provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
